title: An Unexpected Reunion
overview: This 25 year old will go to school pretending to be her truant younger cousin! While she can handle going to class, she has trouble following all the showy pretenses of high school life and ends up in a tough spot, forcing her to take refuge in the nurse’s office when all of a sudden Kanie, a teacher, greets her by saying, “Aren’t you Hana Natori?”, which totally blows her cover. In a surprising turn of events, it turns out that Kanie was a former classmate of hers back in high school! Moreover, without any warning he asks her, “do you know what to do to keep a man quiet?” and starts kissing her deeply, pushing her down in the process! With secrets piling up on one another, there’s no running away!

title: In the Nurse's Office Bed
overview: “I suppose I can keep your secret.” Kanie claims he will work with me to hide the fact that I’m attending school in place of my cousin. After we did all that lewd stuff, he affectionately patted me on the head and now my heart won’t stop pounding! What’s more, that night I got a surprise call from Kanie. He said he’d train for the athletic festival with me, but that would mean the two of us being alone together after school!

title: The Secret After-School Lesson
overview: “We were doing stretches in the athletic storage room and… wait, that’s not right!” Kanie is working out with me in preparation for the athletic festival. After our workout, he helps me stretch, but while he was touches me, I accidentally make some weird noises! He accuses me of leading him on, and no matter how much I squirmed I couldn’t resist or run away… It was just the two of us, alone after school—I’m so hot and sweaty, I feel like I’ll melt away…

title: On the Night of the Class Reunion
overview: “Today you aren’t a student, so I won’t stop halfway.” At our class reunion, where there are no other students or teachers around, we meet as fellow 25-year-olds. It started out as an ordinary evening, but took a sudden turn when I was grabbed by the wrist and lead out of the assembly hall! In a private toilet stall he pulls me close and starts kissing me… Even though we’re supposed to be at the class reunion, he can’t keep his hands off me. But then, all of a sudden, we’re no longer alone in here!

title: How Could I Have Lost Those?!
overview: Hana’s heart races as Kanie stares at her. With a serious expression, Kanie says, “Skirt length, makeup, hair… all against code.” “What?!” That’s right, this is a dress code inspection. Hana, summoned for punishment to a prep room after class, explains that she is only dressed this way to look like her cousin Kaho. Nevertheless he asks if she intends to disobey a teacher in a seductive voice and draws closer… After they do it, Kaho looses something important! What could it be? You’ll have to watch to find out!

title: I'm Going to Be Found Out!
overview: “W-What do I do? I’m not wearing any underwear, and then this happens!” Hana is corned behind the gym, called out there by Aida. He is about to grope her butt. Hana is in quite the pinch! At just that moment, Kanie appearers from behind…

title: Private Study Session
overview: She agreed to be tutored, but never imagined the place would be Kanie’s apartment! Hana is tense with apprehension at being close, and at having him rest his hand on her back. There’s no way she can study like this! Moreover, it’s gotten late, and it looks like she’ll be staying over!

title: On That Day, at That Time, in That Place
overview: You said we wouldn’t do this kind of thing today!”—Hana is spending the night at Kanie’s after staying up late studying. Just out of the bath, it seems the cloths she borrowed are too baggy! Her collarbone and boobs are licked mercilessly and she is pushed down onto the bed…

title: That Morning, Just the Two of Them
overview: Season overview: The romance story centers around Hana Natori, an earnest, good-natured 25-year-old woman whose cousin refuses to go to high school. Hana takes her cousin's place and attends the high school. On her first day, though, Hana's ruse is discovered by her former high school classmate Okito Kanie—who happens to be the high school's world history teacher.
